headline: AI stocks tumble, tech in turmoil
detail: AI and tech names are seeing another wave of selling pressure today. This hits your book directly — PLTR, AVGO, CRWD, SMH, QQQ, and QQQI all live in this space. On margin, a broad tech down-day compresses your cushion across multiple positions simultaneously.

headline: SpaceX stocks getting punished across the board
detail: The headline explicitly says SpaceX FOMO is over and space stocks are being broadly sold off. You hold both SPCX (new IPO, illiquid, volatile) and SPAL (2x leveraged SpaceX ETF) — both are exposed to exactly this sentiment shift. SPAL's leverage means it loses roughly twice the underlying move, and decay makes holding through a downturn costly.

headline: Quad witching Friday — biggest volume day of the year
detail: Today is a major options and futures expiration day, which historically produces outsized, sometimes chaotic price swings that don't reflect real conviction. For a margin trader, this matters because stops can get tagged on noise before prices recover. Be cautious about reading today's moves as clean signals.

headline: Oil slides 2%, Iran deal in focus
detail: Oil dropping 2% on supply outlook eases inflation pressure slightly, which is mildly positive for rate-sensitive growth stocks like yours longer term. However, the contradictory headlines around the Iran deal and ship attacks under the peace deal add geopolitical noise that could spike oil back up — worth monitoring as a macro wildcard for the week.
